scripts.ci:preflight: npm run security:secrets && npm run check:encoding && npm run guard:imports && npm run todos:doctor
scripts.ci:verify: npm run ci:preflight && npm run gate:safety && npm run gate:workflow && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check:copy --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run perf:check --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend
scripts.ci:nightly: npm run ci:verify && npm run security:baseline && npm run security:gate
scripts.todos:workflow: npm run todos:doctor && npm run todos:status && npm run todos:next
scripts.scenarios:multi-site: npm run scenarios:replicate -- --set-id site-alpha --repeat 20 && npm run scenarios:replicate -- --set-id site-beta --repeat 20 && npm run scenarios:replicate -- --set-id site-gamma --repeat 20
scripts.gate:metrics: npm run metrics:m3 -- --enforce && npm run ledger:metrics -- --enforce
scripts.gate:workflow: npm run check:encoding && npm run guard:imports && node scripts/gate-checks.cjs workflow
scripts.gate:scenarios: npm run guard:imports && node scripts/gate-checks.cjs scenarios --run-tests && npm run batch:m5 -- --enforce
scripts.gate:all: npm run workflow:backfill:v9 && npm run gate:safety && npm run gate:workflow && npm run gate:scenarios && npm run gate:metrics
scripts.gate:release: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run gate:all
scripts.health:quick: npm run typecheck --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run check:copy --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend
scripts.health:core: npm run test --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend -- src/components/GovernanceDashboard.test.ts src/views/GovernanceView.test.ts && npm run build --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run perf:check --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run check:copy --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend
scripts.competition:gate: npm run gate:safety && npm run gate:workflow && npm run test --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run build --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run perf:check --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend
scripts.competition:demo: npm run dev --workspace=@copilot-care/backend & npm run dev --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend
scripts.enhance:gate: npm run gate:safety && npm run gate:workflow && npm run test --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run build --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend
scripts.design:gate: npm run test --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run build --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run perf:check --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend && npm run check:copy --workspace=@copilot-care/frontend
scripts.governance:deep:workflow: npm run governance:deep:sync && npm run governance:deep:status && npm run governance:deep:next
scripts.governance:auto:workflow: npm run governance:auto:sync && npm run governance:auto:status && npm run governance:auto:next
